name: Scope 1 and 2 and 3 GHG emissions (market-based)
businessDefinition:
Sum of scope 1, 2 and 3 greenhouse gas emissions, using the market-based method to compute scope 2 greenhouse gas emissions (equity share approach preferably used). See also (EU) 2016/1011 Annex III (1)(e)(i)+(ii)+(iii).
Linked to Regulation (EU) 2022/1288, Annex I, Table 1, Adverse sustainability indicators 1, 2, 3
